title: Neighborhood Sounds
text_zh: 每天早上六点半，楼下的老人开始打太极拳。他们不说话，只有音乐的声音。七点左右，卖早饭的人来了，他大声说「包子，豆浆！」我听着这些声音，觉得很安心。每个早上都一样，但是我一点也不觉得无聊。
text_pinyin: Měitiān zǎoshang liù diǎn bàn, lóuxià de lǎorén kāishǐ dǎ tàijí quán. Tāmen bù shuōhuà, zhǐyǒu yīnyuè de shēngyīn. Qī diǎn zuǒyòu, mài zǎofàn de rén lái le, tā dàshēng shuō「bāozi, dòujiāng!」Wǒ tīngzhe zhèxiē shēngyīn, juéde hěn ānxīn. Měi ge zǎoshang dōu yíyàng, dànshì wǒ yìdiǎn yě bù juéde wúliáo.
text_en: Every morning at six thirty, the elderly people downstairs begin practicing tai chi. They don't speak — there is only the sound of music. Around seven o'clock, the breakfast seller arrives and calls out loudly, 'Baozi, soy milk!' Listening to these sounds, I feel at ease. Every morning is the same, but I don't find it boring at all.

questions.q_zh: 楼下的老人早上做什么？
questions.q_en: What do the elderly people downstairs do in the morning?

questions.q_zh: 作者觉得每天早上的声音怎么样？
questions.q_en: How does the author feel about the morning sounds every day?

title: Weekend Morning
text_zh: 周末不用上班，我起得很晚。阳光从窗户照进来，房间变得很暖和。我慢慢地做了一杯咖啡，坐在窗户旁边看外面的树。风吹过来，树叶轻轻地动。没有什么特别的事情，但是这样的早上让我觉得很幸福。
text_pinyin: Zhōumò búyòng shàngbān, wǒ qǐ de hěn wǎn. Yángguāng cóng chuānghù zhào jìnlái, fángjiān biàn de hěn nuǎnhuo. Wǒ mànmàn de zuò le yì bēi kāfēi, zuò zài chuānghù pángbiān kàn wàimiàn de shù. Fēng chuī guòlái, shùyè qīngqīng de dòng. Méiyǒu shénme tèbié de shìqíng, dànshì zhèyàng de zǎoshang ràng wǒ juéde hěn xìngfú.
text_en: On weekends I don't need to go to work, so I get up very late. Sunlight comes in through the window and the room becomes warm. I slowly make a cup of coffee and sit by the window looking at the trees outside. The wind blows over and the leaves move gently. Nothing special is happening, but a morning like this makes me feel very happy.

questions.q_zh: 周末的早上，作者做了什么？
questions.q_en: What did the author do on the weekend morning?

questions.q_zh: 那天早上天气怎么样？
questions.q_en: What was the weather like that morning?

title: The Tea Shop
text_zh: 我家附近有一个小茶馆，已经开了很多年了。里面的桌子和椅子都是旧的，但是很干净。老板是一个安静的老人，他泡茶泡得很好。每次我去，他都会说「来了啊」，然后给我倒一杯茶。我喜欢坐在角落里，一边喝茶一边看书。
text_pinyin: Wǒ jiā fùjìn yǒu yí ge xiǎo cháguǎn, yǐjīng kāi le hěn duō nián le. Lǐmiàn de zhuōzi hé yǐzi dōu shì jiù de, dànshì hěn gānjìng. Lǎobǎn shì yí ge ānjìng de lǎorén, tā pào chá pào de hěn hǎo. Měi cì wǒ qù, tā dōu huì shuō「lái le a」, ránhòu gěi wǒ dào yì bēi chá. Wǒ xǐhuān zuò zài jiǎoluò lǐ, yìbiān hē chá yìbiān kàn shū.
text_en: Near my home there is a small tea shop that has been open for many years. The tables and chairs inside are old, but very clean. The owner is a quiet old man who makes tea very well. Every time I go, he says 'You're here,' and then pours me a cup of tea. I like to sit in the corner, drinking tea and reading at the same time.

questions.q_zh: 茶馆的老板是什么样的人？
questions.q_en: What kind of person is the tea shop owner?

questions.q_zh: 作者在茶馆里做什么？
questions.q_en: What does the author do in the tea shop?

title: A Handwritten Letter
text_zh: 今天我收到了奶奶寄来的信。她不会用手机，所以每个月都给我写一封信。她的字写得很慢，但是很好看。信里她问我吃得好不好，工作忙不忙。最后她写「天冷了，多穿衣服」。看完信，我的眼睛有一点红了。我决定今天晚上也给她写一封信。
text_pinyin: Jīntiān wǒ shōudào le nǎinai jì lái de xìn. Tā búhuì yòng shǒujī, suǒyǐ měi ge yuè dōu gěi wǒ xiě yì fēng xìn. Tā de zì xiě de hěn màn, dànshì hěn hǎokàn. Xìn lǐ tā wèn wǒ chī de hǎo bù hǎo, gōngzuò máng bù máng. Zuìhòu tā xiě「tiān lěng le, duō chuān yīfu」. Kàn wán xìn, wǒ de yǎnjīng yǒu yìdiǎn hóng le. Wǒ juédìng jīntiān wǎnshang yě gěi tā xiě yì fēng xìn.
text_en: Today I received a letter from my grandmother. She doesn't know how to use a phone, so every month she writes me a letter. Her characters are written slowly, but they are beautiful. In the letter she asks if I'm eating well and if work is busy. At the end she wrote, 'It's gotten cold, wear more clothes.' After reading the letter, my eyes got a little red. I decided to write her a letter tonight too.

questions.q_zh: 奶奶为什么写信？
questions.q_en: Why does grandmother write letters?

questions.q_zh: 看完信以后，作者想做什么？
questions.q_en: After reading the letter, what does the author want to do?

options.pinyin: gěi nǎinai xiě yì fēng xìn

title: The Old Bookstore
text_zh: 这条街上有一家很小的书店。门口放着几个旧书架，上面的书都很便宜。我常常在这里看很长时间的书，老板从来不说什么。有时候我会买一本旧书回家。书里面有别人写的笔记，我觉得很有意思。好像通过这些笔记，我认识了一个不知道名字的朋友。
text_pinyin: Zhè tiáo jiē shàng yǒu yì jiā hěn xiǎo de shūdiàn. Ménkǒu fàngzhe jǐ ge jiù shūjià, shàngmiàn de shū dōu hěn piányi. Wǒ chángcháng zài zhèlǐ kàn hěn cháng shíjiān de shū, lǎobǎn cónglái bù shuō shénme. Yǒu shíhòu wǒ huì mǎi yì běn jiù shū huí jiā. Shū lǐmiàn yǒu biérén xiě de bǐjì, wǒ juéde hěn yǒu yìsi. Hǎoxiàng tōngguò zhèxiē bǐjì, wǒ rènshi le yí ge bù zhīdào míngzì de péngyǒu.
text_en: On this street there is a very small bookstore. At the entrance there are a few old bookshelves, and the books on them are all very cheap. I often spend a long time reading here, and the owner never says anything. Sometimes I buy an old book to take home. Inside the books there are notes written by other people, which I find very interesting. It's as if through these notes, I've gotten to know a friend whose name I don't know.

questions.q_zh: 书店的书怎么样？
questions.q_en: What are the books in the bookstore like?

questions.q_zh: 作者为什么觉得旧书有意思？
questions.q_en: Why does the author find old books interesting?

options.text_en: There are other people's notes inside

title: A Bicycle Ride
text_zh: 下班以后，我没有坐地铁，而是骑自行车回家。路上经过一条河，河边的花开了，很好看。我停下来，站在桥上看了一会儿。风从河上吹过来，很凉快。有几个小孩在河边跑来跑去。我觉得骑车回家虽然慢，但是能看到很多平时看不到的东西。
text_pinyin: Xiàbān yǐhòu, wǒ méiyǒu zuò dìtiě, érshì qí zìxíngchē huí jiā. Lùshang jīngguò yì tiáo hé, hé biān de huā kāi le, hěn hǎokàn. Wǒ tíng xiàlái, zhàn zài qiáo shàng kàn le yíhuìr. Fēng cóng hé shàng chuī guòlái, hěn liángkuài. Yǒu jǐ ge xiǎohái zài hé biān pǎo lái pǎo qù. Wǒ juéde qí chē huí jiā suīrán màn, dànshì néng kàndào hěn duō píngshí kàn búdào de dōngxi.
text_en: After work, I didn't take the subway but rode a bicycle home instead. On the way I passed a river, and the flowers along the riverbank were blooming beautifully. I stopped and stood on the bridge looking for a while. The wind blew over from the river, very cool. A few children were running back and forth by the river. I think cycling home is slower, but you can see many things you normally wouldn't notice.

questions.q_zh: 作者为什么在桥上停下来？
questions.q_en: Why did the author stop on the bridge?

options.text_en: To look at the flowers by the river

questions.q_zh: 作者觉得骑车回家怎么样？
questions.q_en: What does the author think about cycling home?

options.pinyin: suīrán màn, dàn néng kàndào gèng duō
options.text_en: Slow, but you can see more

title: Rain on the Window
text_zh: 今天下了一整天的雨。我坐在家里，看雨水从窗户上慢慢地流下来。外面的声音变得很小，只能听到雨的声音。我泡了一壶茶，拿了一条毯子，坐在沙发上。什么也不做，就这样听着雨声。有时候，什么都不做也是一种休息。
text_pinyin: Jīntiān xià le yì zhěng tiān de yǔ. Wǒ zuò zài jiā lǐ, kàn yǔshuǐ cóng chuānghù shàng mànmàn de liú xiàlái. Wàimiàn de shēngyīn biàn de hěn xiǎo, zhǐ néng tīngdào yǔ de shēngyīn. Wǒ pào le yì hú chá, ná le yì tiáo tǎnzi, zuò zài shāfā shàng. Shénme yě bú zuò, jiù zhèyàng tīngzhe yǔshēng. Yǒu shíhòu, shénme dōu bú zuò yě shì yì zhǒng xiūxi.
text_en: Today it rained all day. I sat at home watching the rainwater slowly flow down the window. The sounds outside became very quiet — you could only hear the sound of rain. I made a pot of tea, grabbed a blanket, and sat on the sofa. I did nothing at all, just listened to the rain like that. Sometimes, doing nothing at all is also a kind of rest.

questions.q_zh: 今天的天气怎么样？
questions.q_en: What was the weather like today?

options.pinyin: xià le yì zhěng tiān de yǔ

options.text_en: It rained for a little while

questions.q_zh: 作者觉得「什么都不做」是什么？
questions.q_en: What does the author think 'doing nothing' is?

title: A Shared Meal
text_zh: 今天晚上，我请邻居来家里吃饭。我做了三个菜：一个西红柿炒鸡蛋，一个青菜，一个鱼汤。菜不多，但是都是自己做的。邻居带了一些水果来。我们一边吃一边聊天，说了很多有意思的事情。吃完饭以后，我们一起洗碗。虽然是很简单的晚饭，但是大家都很开心。
text_pinyin: Jīntiān wǎnshang, wǒ qǐng línjū lái jiā lǐ chīfàn. Wǒ zuò le sān ge cài: yí ge xīhóngshì chǎo jīdàn, yí ge qīngcài, yí ge yú tāng. Cài bù duō, dànshì dōu shì zìjǐ zuò de. Línjū dài le yìxiē shuǐguǒ lái. Wǒmen yìbiān chī yìbiān liáotiān, shuō le hěn duō yǒu yìsi de shìqíng. Chī wán fàn yǐhòu, wǒmen yìqǐ xǐ wǎn. Suīrán shì hěn jiǎndān de wǎnfàn, dànshì dàjiā dōu hěn kāixīn.
text_en: Tonight I invited my neighbor to eat at my home. I made three dishes: scrambled eggs with tomatoes, green vegetables, and fish soup. Not many dishes, but all homemade. My neighbor brought some fruit. We chatted while eating, talking about many interesting things. After dinner, we washed the dishes together. Although it was a very simple dinner, everyone was very happy.

questions.q_zh: 作者做了几个菜？
questions.q_en: How many dishes did the author make?

questions.q_zh: 邻居带了什么来？
questions.q_en: What did the neighbor bring?

title: An Evening Walk
text_zh: 吃完晚饭，我和妈妈出去散步。我们走在小区旁边的路上，路灯已经亮了。空气里有花的香味。妈妈走得不快，我也放慢了脚步。她跟我说了一些小时候的事情，都是我没听过的。走了半个小时，我们慢慢走回家。我觉得和家人一起散步的时间，比看手机有意思多了。
text_pinyin: Chī wán wǎnfàn, wǒ hé māma chūqù sànbù. Wǒmen zǒu zài xiǎoqū pángbiān de lù shàng, lùdēng yǐjīng liàng le. Kōngqì lǐ yǒu huā de xiāngwèi. Māma zǒu de bú kuài, wǒ yě fàngmàn le jiǎobù. Tā gēn wǒ shuō le yìxiē xiǎoshíhòu de shìqíng, dōu shì wǒ méi tīng guò de. Zǒu le bàn ge xiǎoshí, wǒmen mànmàn zǒu huí jiā. Wǒ juéde hé jiārén yìqǐ sànbù de shíjiān, bǐ kàn shǒujī yǒu yìsi duō le.
text_en: After dinner, Mom and I went out for a walk. We walked on the road next to the neighborhood, and the streetlights were already on. There was the fragrance of flowers in the air. Mom didn't walk fast, so I also slowed my steps. She told me some stories from when she was young — things I'd never heard before. After walking for half an hour, we slowly walked home. I think the time spent walking with family is much more interesting than looking at a phone.

questions.q_zh: 妈妈跟作者说了什么？
questions.q_en: What did Mom talk about with the author?

questions.q_zh: 作者觉得什么比看手机有意思？
questions.q_en: What does the author think is more interesting than looking at a phone?

title: Garden Moments
text_zh: 我的阳台上有几盆花。每天早上，我都会给它们浇水。有一盆花上个星期还没有开，今天早上我发现它开了一朵小花，是黄色的。我高兴得拍了一张照片发给朋友看。朋友说「你现在像一个老人一样了」。我笑了，觉得这样也挺好的。慢慢地看着一朵花开，是一件很快乐的事。
text_pinyin: Wǒ de yángtái shàng yǒu jǐ pén huā. Měitiān zǎoshang, wǒ dōu huì gěi tāmen jiāo shuǐ. Yǒu yì pén huā shàng ge xīngqī hái méiyǒu kāi, jīntiān zǎoshang wǒ fāxiàn tā kāi le yì duǒ xiǎo huā, shì huángsè de. Wǒ gāoxìng de pāi le yì zhāng zhàopiàn fā gěi péngyǒu kàn. Péngyǒu shuō「nǐ xiànzài xiàng yí ge lǎorén yíyàng le」. Wǒ xiào le, juéde zhèyàng yě tǐng hǎo de. Mànmàn de kànzhe yì duǒ huā kāi, shì yí jiàn hěn kuàilè de shì.
text_en: I have a few pots of flowers on my balcony. Every morning, I water them. One pot hadn't bloomed last week, but this morning I noticed it had opened a small flower — it was yellow. I was so happy that I took a photo and sent it to a friend. My friend said, 'You're like an old person now.' I laughed and thought that's actually pretty nice. Slowly watching a flower bloom is a very joyful thing.

questions.q_zh: 花是什么颜色的？
questions.q_en: What color is the flower?

questions.q_zh: 朋友说了什么？
questions.q_en: What did the friend say?

options.pinyin: nǐ xiàng yí ge lǎorén yíyàng le
options.text_en: You're like an old person now
I also want to grow flowers

title: A Small Kindness
text_zh: 今天下雨，我在公共汽车站等车。旁边站着一个小女孩，她没有带伞，衣服已经湿了。我把伞给了她，说「你用吧，我快到家了」。其实我家还很远。小女孩笑着说「谢谢姐姐」。车来了，我跑上车，虽然身上湿了，但是心里很暖。有时候，帮一个人不需要做很大的事。
text_pinyin: Jīntiān xiàyǔ, wǒ zài gōnggòng qìchē zhàn děng chē. Pángbiān zhànzhe yí ge xiǎo nǚhái, tā méiyǒu dài sǎn, yīfu yǐjīng shī le. Wǒ bǎ sǎn gěi le tā, shuō「nǐ yòng ba, wǒ kuài dào jiā le」. Qíshí wǒ jiā hái hěn yuǎn. Xiǎo nǚhái xiàozhe shuō「xièxie jiějie」. Chē lái le, wǒ pǎo shàng chē, suīrán shēnshang shī le, dànshì xīnlǐ hěn nuǎn. Yǒu shíhòu, bāng yí ge rén bù xūyào zuò hěn dà de shì.
text_en: Today it was raining and I was waiting for the bus at the stop. A little girl was standing next to me — she didn't have an umbrella and her clothes were already wet. I gave her my umbrella and said, 'You use it, I'm almost home.' Actually my home was still very far. The little girl smiled and said, 'Thank you, big sister.' The bus came and I ran on. Although my clothes were wet, my heart felt warm. Sometimes helping someone doesn't require doing anything big.

questions.q_zh: 作者为什么把伞给小女孩？
questions.q_en: Why did the author give her umbrella to the little girl?

options.text: 小女孩没有伞，衣服湿了
options.pinyin: xiǎo nǚhái méiyǒu sǎn, yīfu shī le
options.text_en: The girl had no umbrella and was wet

questions.q_zh: 作者说「我快到家了」是真的吗？
questions.q_en: Was the author telling the truth when she said 'I'm almost home'?

options.pinyin: búshì, tā jiā hái hěn yuǎn
options.text_en: No, her home was still far away

title: Seasonal Changes
text_zh: 我办公室窗外有一棵大树。春天的时候，树上长出了绿色的小叶子。夏天，叶子变得又大又多，像一把大伞。秋天来了，叶子慢慢变成红色和黄色，特别好看。冬天的时候，叶子都掉了，只有树枝。同事说这棵树不好看了，但是我觉得每个季节的树都有不一样的美。
text_pinyin: Wǒ bàngōngshì chuāngwài yǒu yì kē dà shù. Chūntiān de shíhòu, shù shàng zhǎng chū le lǜsè de xiǎo yèzi. Xiàtiān, yèzi biàn de yòu dà yòu duō, xiàng yì bǎ dà sǎn. Qiūtiān lái le, yèzi mànmàn biàn chéng hóngsè hé huángsè, tèbié hǎokàn. Dōngtiān de shíhòu, yèzi dōu diào le, zhǐyǒu shùzhī. Tóngshì shuō zhè kē shù bù hǎokàn le, dànshì wǒ juéde měi ge jìjié de shù dōu yǒu bù yíyàng de měi.
text_en: Outside my office window there is a big tree. In spring, small green leaves grow on it. In summer, the leaves become big and plentiful, like a large umbrella. When autumn comes, the leaves slowly turn red and yellow — especially beautiful. In winter, all the leaves have fallen, leaving only branches. My colleague says the tree doesn't look nice anymore, but I think the tree has a different kind of beauty in each season.

questions.q_zh: 夏天的时候，树像什么？
questions.q_en: What does the tree look like in summer?

questions.q_zh: 同事觉得冬天的树怎么样？
questions.q_en: What does the colleague think about the tree in winter?

title: A Familiar Route
text_zh: 我每天走同一条路去上班。路过早饭店的时候，老板会对我笑一下。经过学校门口，能听到孩子们读书的声音。到了公园旁边，总是能看到几个老人在锻炼。这条路我走了三年了，路上的人和店我都很熟悉。有人问我为什么不换一条路走，我说这条路上的每一个小变化，都让我觉得生活在慢慢变好。
text_pinyin: Wǒ měitiān zǒu tóng yì tiáo lù qù shàngbān. Lùguò zǎofàndiàn de shíhòu, lǎobǎn huì duì wǒ xiào yíxià. Jīngguò xuéxiào ménkǒu, néng tīngdào háizimen dúshū de shēngyīn. Dào le gōngyuán pángbiān, zǒngshì néng kàndào jǐ ge lǎorén zài duànliàn. Zhè tiáo lù wǒ zǒu le sān nián le, lùshang de rén hé diàn wǒ dōu hěn shúxī. Yǒu rén wèn wǒ wèishénme bú huàn yì tiáo lù zǒu, wǒ shuō zhè tiáo lù shàng de měi yí ge xiǎo biànhuà, dōu ràng wǒ juéde shēnghuó zài mànmàn biàn hǎo.
text_en: Every day I walk the same road to work. When I pass the breakfast shop, the owner smiles at me. Passing the school entrance, I can hear the sound of children reading aloud. By the park, I can always see a few elderly people exercising. I've walked this road for three years, and I'm familiar with all the people and shops along the way. Someone asked me why I don't take a different route. I said that every small change on this road makes me feel that life is slowly getting better.

questions.q_zh: 作者走这条路多长时间了？
questions.q_en: How long has the author been walking this route?

questions.q_zh: 作者为什么不换一条路走？
questions.q_en: Why doesn't the author take a different route?

options.text_en: Because there are no other routes

options.pinyin: yīnwèi zhè tiáo lù zuì duǎn

options.text: 因为路上的小变化让他觉得生活变好
options.pinyin: yīnwèi lùshang de xiǎo biànhuà ràng tā juéde shēnghuó biàn hǎo
options.text_en: Because the small changes make him feel life is getting better
